bio.EN: A Germany-born, world-roaming Senior Art Director & Brand Designer with 9+ years of experience. I bring visions to life – with soul, strategy and presence.
bio.DE: Ein in Deutschland geborener, weltweit tätiger Senior Art Director und Brand Designer mit über 9 Jahren Erfahrung. Ich erwecke Visionen zum Leben – mit Herzblut, Strategie und Präsenz.

quote.EN: Working with Leon was very pleasant and fun! I really love how flexible and creative he helped me with our project. I highly appreciate working on eye-level with him. I felt understood and seen throughout the whole project. Happy to work with you again!
quote.DE: Die Zusammenarbeit mit Leon war sehr angenehm und hat Spaß gemacht! Ich finde es toll, wie flexibel und kreativ er mich bei unserem Projekt unterstützt hat. Ich schätze es sehr, dass wir uns auf Augenhöhe begegnen. Ich habe mich während des gesamten Projekts verstanden und wahrgenommen gefühlt. Ich freue mich auf die nächste Zusammenarbeit mit dir!

quote.EN: I’ve worked with Leon twice, simply because the results from our first project were outstanding. He exceeded my expectations both times, translating my ideas into websites I genuinely love. Efficient, knowledgeable, solution-oriented... I can wholeheartedly recommend collaborating with him.
quote.DE: Ich habe bereits zweimal mit Leon zusammengearbeitet, ganz einfach weil die Ergebnisse unseres ersten Projekts hervorragend waren. Er hat meine Erwartungen beide Male übertroffen und meine Ideen in Websites umgesetzt, die mir wirklich sehr gut gefallen. Effizient, kompetent, lösungsorientiert … Ich kann eine Zusammenarbeit mit ihm wärmstens empfehlen.

quote.EN:
Leon managed our Instagram channel for two months, bringing it to life with beautiful graphics, his own ideas, and a great sense of thinking outside the box.
He worked independently, took responsibility, and took a huge load off our shoulders.We are grateful and thrilled! Leon comes highly recommended from the bottom of our hearts.
quote.DE:
Leon hat unseren Instagram-Kanal zwei Monate lang betreut und ihn mit wunderschönen Grafiken, eigenen Ideen und viel Kreativität zum Leben erweckt.
Er hat selbstständig gearbeitet, Verantwortung übernommen und uns eine riesige Last von den Schultern genommen. Wir sind dankbar und begeistert! Wir können Leon von ganzem Herzen wärmstens empfehlen.

desc.EN: Complete brand system and Webflow site for a premium real estate developer.
desc.DE: Komplettes Markensystem und Webflow-Website für einen Premium-Immobilienentwickler.

desc.EN: Website design and development for a German life coach — built twice, loved both times.
desc.DE: Webdesign und Entwicklung für einen deutschen Life-Coach — zweimal gebaut, beide Male geliebt.

note.EN: Most of my work is under NDA. If you'd like to see more — let's talk.
note.DE: Der Großteil meiner Arbeit unterliegt einer NDA. Wenn du mehr sehen möchtest — lass uns reden.

sub.EN: Whether it's a brand, a website or a conversation — I'm just a message away.
sub.DE: Ob Marke, Website oder Gespräch — ich bin nur eine Nachricht entfernt.

location.EN: Currently based in Bali, Indonesia — working globally
location.DE: Derzeit auf Bali, Indonesien — weltweit tätig

oakstone.title: Oakstone Hills
oakstone.tagline: Movement for body & mind — a retreat website experience.
oakstone.background: Oakstone Hills is an exclusive retreat destination in the hills of Portugal — a space for yoga, functional training and conscious regeneration, embedded in a nature immersion. The goal was to translate the essence of the place into a digital experience: warm, grounded and nature-driven, and at the same time premium, minimal and modern.

challenge.intro: The key challenge was capturing the emotional core of Oakstone Hills and turning it into a high-converting digital environment:
items: Translating the founder's vision into an authentic brand tone
Creating a powerful storytelling and visual flow
Choosing and implementing the ideal booking platform
Aligning multiple creative disciplines — copy, photography, brand design
Designing a smooth, intuitive booking process
Organic shapes, calm spacing, refined typography
Visual storytelling grounded in nature and movement
UX planning for the booking flow

result.intro: A calm yet compelling digital brand experience that evokes trust, inspires action, and brings guests into the world of Oakstone Hills.
outcomes: High-quality visual presence aligned with the retreat experience
result.closing: The website connects nature, movement and stillness with a modern, premium digital touch — making retreat booking seamless, inviting and emotionally resonant.

joetrenk.title: Joe Trenk / Leben Lehrt
joetrenk.tagline: A life coach's voice, online — built twice, loved both times.
joetrenk.background: Joe Trenk is a German life coach whose work is deeply personal — it lives in conversation, presence and trust. His website needed to carry that warmth before a single word was read, and to make booking a session feel like an easy, human next step rather than a transaction.

challenge.intro: Coaching is intimate, and a website can easily feel cold. The challenge was to keep it personal at every turn:
items: Putting Joe's personality and presence front and centre
Making the offer clear without sounding like a sales page
Guiding visitors gently toward booking a first conversation
Building something flexible enough to grow with his practice
A warmer, more human visual direction
Copy direction that sounds like Joe, not a brochure
Subtle motion that supports the story
A full rework as the practice evolved
Carried over everything that worked the first time

result.intro: A website that feels like Joe — warm, grounded and direct — and turns quiet interest into booked conversations.
outcomes: A clear path from visitor to booked session
A site we built twice, better each time
A platform that grows with the practice
result.closing: Built twice, loved both times — the second version kept the soul of the first and gave Joe a home online that genuinely sounds like him.
